summary: Iteration 8: Full test of audio proxy stream endpoint, Henry Corbin removal, and frontend course/audio player flow. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). All 3 frontend scenarios passed. Expo service is intermittently unstable (ngrok tunnel crashes every ~30-60s) but app works correctly in stable windows.

ui_bugs.issue: Play button shows ActivityIndicator (loading spinner) instead of play icon in the initial state when navigating to audio page (before pressing play). Condition `!isCurrentTrack && !isPlaying` triggers spinner for initial unplayed state, which is confusing UX. Should show play icon; spinner should only appear during actual buffering/loading.
Thumbnail/cover art shows as gray square for sync-created audios because thumbnail field is empty in DB. Sync script does not populate thumbnail for module audios.

ui_bugs.component: CourseDetailScreen - modules count in meta row
ui_bugs.issue: Shows ' modules' (blank number) instead of '10 modules' because course.modules_count is 0/null for sync-created courses. The programme section correctly shows 10 real modules, so the meta row count mismatch is misleading.

issues: Green play button with spinner inside instead of play icon creates confusion - user may think audio is loading when app is just in initial state

test_results_detail.backend_test_1: PASS: GET /api/audios/aud_cours-falsafa-grands-mod-1 → stream_url is proxy URL ending in /api/audios/.../stream (not R2 presigned)
test_results_detail.backend_test_2: PASS: stream_url starts with https:// (PUBLIC_URL used)
test_results_detail.backend_test_4: PASS: stream-url endpoint returns proxy path /api/audios/.../stream
test_results_detail.backend_test_5: PASS: audio_id matches in stream-url response
test_results_detail.backend_test_9: PASS: stream body non-empty (at least 1024 bytes received)
test_results_detail.backend_test_10: PASS: Range request GET /stream with Range: bytes=0-4095 → 206 Partial Content
test_results_detail.backend_test_11: PASS: Range request returns exactly 4096 bytes
test_results_detail.backend_test_12: PASS: Content-Range header present in 206 response
test_results_detail.backend_test_14: PASS: GET /api/masterclasses → Henry Corbin absent from all masterclasses (title/speaker/description checked)
test_results_detail.backend_test_16: PASS: Kalam audio has proxy stream_url (not R2 presigned)
test_results_detail.frontend_test_1: PASS: Login with testuser@hikma.com/TestUser123! → redirected to home page
test_results_detail.frontend_test_2: PASS: Course detail page cours-falsafa-grands shows 10 real modules (Al-Kindī, Al-Fārābī, Avicenne...) with 'Aperçu gratuit' badge on first module
test_results_detail.frontend_test_3: PASS: Click on course-module-cours-falsafa-grands-mod-1 → navigates to /audio/aud_cours-falsafa-grands-mod-1
test_results_detail.frontend_test_4: PASS: Audio player page has play button (data-testid='audio-play-pause', visible=True)

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix AudioDetailScreen play button logic - initial state (!isCurrentTrack && !isPlaying) should show play icon not spinner. Spinner should only show during active buffering/loading.
LOW: Populate thumbnail field for sync-created audio docs (or provide a default placeholder thumbnail)
LOW: Set modules_count correctly for sync-created course documents to avoid blank count in course meta row
INFO: Expo ngrok tunnel keeps crashing every ~30-60s (environment issue) - not a code issue
critical_code_review_comments: Play button logic in AudioDetailScreen is inverted: `!isCurrentTrack && !isPlaying` shows spinner (should be 'initial/ready to play' state showing play icon, not spinner). The spinner implies loading which confuses users on first visit.
resolve_audio_url() correctly uses PUBLIC_URL from .env to generate proxy URLs - this is the right approach to avoid CORS issues with direct R2 access.
api_route with methods=['GET','HEAD'] on /stream endpoint correctly handles HEAD requests for audio preloading.
stream_audio() reads entire file body with resp['Body'].read() - for large files this could be memory-intensive. Consider streaming in chunks using StreamingResponse for production.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All proxy stream features verified. Backend proxy endpoint works: GET /api/audios/{id}/stream returns 200 with audio content; Range requests return 206 with correct bytes; stream-url returns source='proxy'. Henry Corbin removed from masterclasses. Frontend course page shows real modules, first module click navigates to audio player. Known issues: (1) Expo ngrok tunnel is unstable - wait for HTTP 200 before testing frontend; (2) Play button shows spinner in initial state (bug); (3) Sync-created audio docs lack thumbnails; (4) Courses missing modules_count field for meta row.
rca_of_issue: Previous CORS issue: R2 was refusing browser CORS requests (403). Fix: backend now proxies R2 audio via /api/audios/{id}/stream endpoint. resolve_audio_url() uses PUBLIC_URL env var to build proxy URLs instead of R2 presigned URLs. stream_audio() uses boto3 synchronous get_object() to fetch from R2 and returns the content with proper headers including Accept-Ranges: bytes for media player compatibility.
